news.t: European ETF flows signal concern about recession

holdings.infoBox: HDEF is an equity ETF with a total of 141 individual holdings. The top holdings are Novartis AG stock at 5.02%, Roche Holding AG at 4.90%, Nestlé at 4.88%, Shell at 4.84%, and TotalEnergies SE at 4.20%.

overview.description: The Xtrackers MSCI EAFE High Dividend Yield Equity ETF (HDEF) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the MSCI EAFE High Dividend Yield index. The fund tracks a cap-weighted index of developed country stocks, ex-North America, selected by quality and dividend factors. HDEF was launched on Aug 12, 2015 and is issued by Xtrackers.

data.title: European ETF flows signal concern about recession
data.text: In the last few weeks, money has started to flow out of European ETFs. For investors who want to stay in, currency hedging is key.

data.title: ETF Edge: European recession priced in?
data.text: Are European ETFs already pricing in a recession abroad?
